llm_response:
Embarking on your journey to lose ten pounds is a fantastic step toward a healthier, happier you, and remember that every small effort counts toward your success. This three-month plan is designed to be gentle on your joints while building strength and stamina, ensuring that you feel empowered rather than overwhelmed. By focusing on low-impact activities like walking, swimming, and gentle yoga, you create a foundation for sustainable lifestyle changes that will last a lifetime.

Your weekly routine will follow a progressive structure, meaning the intensity and duration will develop gradually or in stages to match your growing confidence. Week one involves thirty minutes of brisk walking three times a week, followed by two sessions of basic bodyweight squats and arm raises to build foundational strength. As you move into weeks two and three, you will increase your walking time to forty-five minutes and introduce light resistance bands for upper body work, always listening to your body and celebrating each milestone.

As you reach the end of this three-month journey, reflect on how far you have come and the positive energy you have cultivated along the way. Your dedication to tracking your weekly progress through a simple journal or app will highlight your achievements and keep you motivated during any challenging moments. You have successfully completed your first major goal, proving that with patience and consistency, you can achieve anything you set your mind to. Keep this momentum going, for your future self will thank you for the courage it took to start.
